title: polygala cymosa
intro: Polygala cymosa, also known as Mexican milkwort, is a flowering plant species in the family Polygalaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygala cymosa are attributed to its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Polygala cymosa can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, or used in herbal teas and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
